content_body: I couldn’t think of a more perfect place to spend Mother’s Day than right here in this beautiful cabin home. My girls (ages 6 and 3) loved walking down to the creek and the hot tub. We brought my parents along, and they enjoyed shopping and dining downtown. My husband and I enjoyed the outside decks at night, listening to the sounds of nature. It was our first trip, but we will be back.
title: Perfect Mother's Day
